description:
To properly set the permissions of /var/log/sssd/*, run the command: 
$ sudo chmod 0660 /var/log/sssd/*
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/sssd</tt> directory contains debug logs for the System
Security Services Daemon (SSSD) and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil:
To check the permissions of /var/log/sssd/*, run the command: 
$ ls -l /var/log/sssd/*
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following permissions: -rw-rw----
title: Verify Permissions of Files in /var/log/sssd
